title: Crude oil extends losses amid a risk-off tone across markets
section_path: Crude oil extends losses amid a risk-off tone across markets
section_path_text: Crude oil extends losses amid a risk-off tone across markets
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Flight to safety was the dominant theme, although panic selling of risk assets eased. Commodities remained under pressure amid concerns of further economic weakness. Gold was steady as investor demand eased back following a surge yesterday amid the US banking ructions.
